title: Admin Met with Calm
subtitle: An affirmation for facing financial paperwork without dread
excerpt: A short affirmation for bringing calm rather than avoidance to financial admin tasks. The statement names the posture: meeting forms, filing, and bookkeeping with the same easy attention you'd bring to any practical task.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 53 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the start of a financial admin session, or when you notice the pull to delay a money task.

content.text: A brief affirmation for arriving at financial admin without the weight of dread. The aim is not to enjoy admin but to meet it steadily, the same way you'd approach any practical task that needs doing.
The affirmation names calm as the posture, not enthusiasm. Some admin will always be dull. The shift is from dread to neutral, from 'I can't face this' to 'I'll do it and it'll be done.'
I meet financial admin with calm. I do what needs doing. I am organised and steady with my money.
Say it out loud three times before opening a form or starting a bookkeeping session. Pair it with a cup of tea and a closed door if you can. Three repetitions, slow, hand on heart.
Adapted from Day 53 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
